name: World of Hyatt Credit Card
perks: Free Category 1-4 night award certificate every year
4x Hyatt points at Hyatt hotels, resorts, and restaurants
2x on dining, airline tickets, transit, gyms, and fitness studios
Automatic Discoverist elite status (including late checkout and room upgrades)
5 qualifying night credits per year toward elite status
65,000 bonus points: 30,000 after $3,000 spend in 3 months, plus 2x on up to $15,000 spend in first 6 months
drawbacks: Hyatt has smaller hotel footprint than Marriott or Hilton
Free night certificate category caps at 4 (limits use at premium properties)
4x only at Hyatt properties, not at competitors
